sections.sectionTitle: Pilna A Hoihna leh Sauvei A Kiman'na

verses.text: Ngai un! Pilna in hong sam a, thungaihsut theihna hong kiko hilo ahi hiam
Lamdung mualtung tengah, lamka citeng mun khempeuhah ding a
khuapi lutna lampi gei-ah, mi omna kongpi tualah hong kiko a
“Mi khempeuh tungah ka hong thum a, leitunga om mi khempeuh ka hong sam hi
Ngaihsut kicing nailote aw, na lungsim uh khanghamsak un. Mihaite aw, thu ngaihsun un
Ngai un, thu manpha kong gen ding hi; ka gen khempeuh thuman vive ahi hi
Ka thugente a man bekbek hi a, zuauthu ka deih kei hi
Ka gen khempeuh ahi vive hi a, zuauthu, thukawi om hetlo hi
Thungaihsun theite-a' dingin telnop mahmah a, thu mutheite-a' dingin siang mahmah hi
Ngun sangin kong thuhilhnate deihzaw un la, kham hoihpen sangin thutheihna deihzaw un
“Suangmanpha sangin pilna ahi keimah ka hoihzaw a, kei tawh na hong tehpih theih ding uh a manpha dang omlo hi
Pilna ahi keimah in thuthuk muhtheihna ka nei a, thu a telin theihna leh a kilawm ngaihsut theihna ka nei hi
Topa zahtakna pen thusia muhdahna hi a, kiphatsakna leh kihihsakna, gamtatsia leh thuzuau ka mudah hi
Thu geelin ka semkhia a, thu theihtelna nei-in, kei ka thahat hi
Kumpite in a gammite a ukna ding, mi ukte in ngeina man a zat theihna dingin keimah in ka huh hi
Leitunga om mi ukte khempeuh in keima huhna bek tawh ukzo uh a, milian mi thupite in keima huhna bek tawh vaihawmzo uh hi
Kei hong itte ka it a, kei hong zong peuhmahte in hong mu uh hi
Piakkhiat theih ding hauhna leh minphatna, daupaina leh ma tutsak zawhna a kicingin ka nei hi
Keima kiang panin na ngahte uh ngun hoihpen sangin hoihzaw a, kham hoihpen sangin zong hoihzaw lai hi
Thuman lampi ka zui a, thutang lampi ka tawn hi
Kei hong itte ka hausak a, a inn dimin neihlelam ka pia hi
“ Topa in kei hong piangsak masa pen a, tangtawnga ama sep lak pan a masa pen ka hi hi
Tangtawng pek lai-in kei hong bawl a, leitung a om ma-in hong bawl masak pen ka hi hi
Tuipite a om ma-in kei ka suakkhin a, kei' suah hunin lui tuite om nailo hi
Mual liante a kibawl ma-in kei ka suakkhin a, mual neute a kibawl ma pekin kei ka om khinta hi
Leitung khempeuh a bawl ma, lei themkhat bek nangawn a bawl ma pekin kei ka om khinta hi
Amah in vantung bawlin tuipi kimkotah vanpi mong ding a bawl laitak
amah in vantungah meiite kipsakin tuipi tuinakte a bawl laitak
tuipi tuite in ama cihna ban a khengin a luan'lohna ding thu a piak laitak ka om a, leitung bulpi a phuh laitak kei ka om hi
Na geel siampa bangin amah tawh kikhawlin keimah pen nisimin ama lungdamna ka hi a, ama kianga om nuamsa-in
leitungah ka lungdam a, mihingte lakah nuam ka sa hi
“Tate aw, tu-in ka thugen hong ngai un la, kong gente zui le uh cin lungdamna na ngah ding uh hi
Hong kihilhnate zui-in pilna ngah un la, thudon loin ommawk kei un
Ka thugenna a ngai, nisimin ka kong gei-ah omin, ka inn-ah a ngak mipa in lungdamna ngah ding hi
Kei hong mu mi in nuntakna a mu hi a, Topa' mai-ah maipha ngah ahi hi
Ahi zongin kei hong mulo mi, amahmah a kisusia hi a, kei hong mudah peuhmah, a si nuam ahi hi,” hong ci hi.
